overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The scene features wet pavement reflecting colorful holographic advertisements, futuristic skyscrapers, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

events.description: begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the sidewalk
exits the covered overpass area onto the open sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk from under the overpass toward the street corner

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving past the crosswalk with headlights on

entered.detail: large concrete bridge overhead with support columns
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes
shadowed building front with minimal lighting
large illuminated advertisement with purple and pink neon colors

segments.scene_description: The character starts under a concrete overpass at night, with vehicles passing on the right. They begin crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk, moving from the sheltered area toward the open sidewalk. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights as they approach the street corner.

events.description: passes the bright green neon-lit building entrance on the left
turns slightly right to follow the curve of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack running across the street ahead

entered.detail: building facade illuminated with bright green neon lighting and glass doors
reflective pavement surface showing neon color reflections
floating digital advertisements above the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open sidewalk, the character passes a building entrance illuminated with bright green neon lighting. The street is moderately busy with pedestrians and sparse vehicle traffic on the adjacent road. Wet concrete reflects the colorful holographic advertisements from nearby buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital displays

events.description: enters the covered pedestrian walkway with overhead canopy
passes the street food vendor cart positioned on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade section, passing by the food vendor and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the illuminated food cart under a red umbrella

entered.detail: overhead metal roof structure covering the pedestrian path
series of large digital screens displaying advertisements on the building wall
street food stall with bright lighting and red umbrella
velvet ropes on stanchions guiding pedestrian flow along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian walkway lined with digital advertising screens on the left wall. They pass a street food vendor cart positioned on the right side, with red rope barriers guiding pedestrian flow. The overhead canopy provides shelter while neon signs illuminate the path ahead.

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open plaza area
crosses the street between orange construction barriers

agents.ego_description: crossing the street section while navigating around construction barriers, approaching the open plaza

notable_agents.action: character with bright red hair and glowing green shoes walking across the street

entered.detail: plastic construction barriers blocking off part of the street
metal public seating along the sidewalk edge
tall illuminated advertisement screen displaying bright white light

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the character enters an open plaza area with metal benches lining the right side. They cross a street section marked by orange construction barriers, passing a character with distinctive red hair. A large vertical billboard dominates the view ahead, displaying bright white light against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: major avenue with dense neon signage

events.description: approaches the major intersection with the Orbital Air tower visible ahead
waits as multiple vehicles pass on the wide avenue to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the wide sidewalk toward the dense urban center with towering neon buildings

notable_agents.action: line of futuristic cars driving along the wide avenue with headlights illuminating the road

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with distinctive red and white orbital air signage near the top
broad multi-lane street with moving traffic
cluster of high-rise buildings covered in colorful neon advertisements and window lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide sidewalk approaching a major intersection, with the iconic Orbital Air tower visible in the distance. Tall skyscrapers covered in neon signage rise on all sides, creating a canyon of colorful artificial light. Vehicles move along the wide avenue to the right as the character continues toward the dense urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that evolves from a sheltered underpass into a sprawling, high-tech city center. It begins beneath a concrete overpass, moving across a yellow-striped crosswalk where wet pavement reflects the surrounding glow of the night. As the camera reaches the open sidewalk, the scene shifts past bright green neon building entrances and holographic advertisements before transitioning into a covered pedestrian walkway lined with digital screens and a street food vendor. The path then opens into a plaza marked by orange construction barriers and metal benches, leading the view toward a towering vertical billboard of bright white light. Finally, the camera advances along a wide avenue toward a major intersection, where the environment expands into a canyon of skyscrapers and neon signage with the Orbital Air tower looming in the distance.
